name: @agent-master/desktop
description: agent-master Electron desktop shell (wraps @agent-master/web, OS-secure token storage, agentmaster:// deep-link pairing)
author: Ken-Chy129

scripts.dev: cross-env AM_DESKTOP_DEV=1 npm run compile && cross-env AM_DESKTOP_DEV=1 electron .
scripts.build: npm run prebuild:web && npm run compile
